name: Golf Lab - Cedar Falls
address: 201 Washington St Suite B, Cedar Falls, IA 50613
about: Golf Lab is an indoor golf studio located in downtown Cedar Falls, IA, featuring four private simulator bays equipped with Foresight GC Hawk technology. The venue offers a full-service bar and a spacious lounge area for socializing, making it suitable for both individual practice and group events. Public pricing is structured by time of day, with rates ranging from $25 to $52 per hour per bay. Memberships are available in Bronze, Silver, and Gold tiers, providing hourly playtime benefits and discounts on peak rates. Members also have access to the facility during designated member-only hours, with key fob entry for independent use.
why_golfers_like_it: High-end Foresight GC Hawk simulator technology for accurate play
Flexible pricing model with discounts for off-peak hours and memberships
Stocked bar and spacious social area for a complete golf and social experience
Key fob access for members to use the facility independently during off-hours

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with options for events and parties
Stocked bar on-site, serving a variety of beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: 4 private simulator bays equipped with Foresight GC Hawk technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a stocked bar and kitchen, but outside food and drink policies are not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the simulator software and player pace, but typically ranges from 1 to 2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for families, with options for parties and events that can accommodate children.
